heading: Developing policy and recommending responsible Federal agency
label: 71103 Developing policy and recommending responsible Federal agency

children.text: develop a policy for notifying Federal agencies and relevant emergency response institutions of an impending near-Earth object threat, if near-term public safety is at risk; and

children.label: A
children.text: protecting the United States from a near-Earth object that is expected to collide with Earth; and

children.label: B
children.text: implementing a deflection campaign, in consultation with international bodies, should one be necessary.
